project.name: GEODE
project.description: Source-attested promotion path from a bounded policy mutation to paired tau2 evidence.

nodes.name: Tau2 agent policy
nodes.summary: The sole candidate-owned behavior surface for this campaign.

nodes.name: Tau2 GEODE adapter
nodes.summary: Builds GEODE participants, delegates half-duplex turn control, and persists per-turn pre-execution retry identity.

nodes.name: Tau2 turn supervisor
nodes.summary: Owns the half-duplex deadline, stop mapping, and retry-telemetry projection while AgenticLoop yields after each completed tool batch.

nodes.name: AgenticLoop
nodes.summary: Runs model and tool rounds until termination, with default-off external boundaries and current-run pre-execution retry identity for evaluator attestation.

nodes.name: Tool call processor
nodes.summary: Executes one model response's tool calls and preserves input order while batching eligible calls.

nodes.name: Paired tau2 evaluator
nodes.summary: Derives frozen runner arguments, gives baseline and candidate one shared monotonic deadline, emits hash-bound runtime receipts, screens unreachable train arms at zero candidate cost, and projects structural failure codes. Reuses identity-proven cached rows across relaunches and stops the paid process group after finalized infrastructure contamination.

nodes.name: Hash-bound row cache
nodes.summary: Reuses only infrastructure-clean semantic tau2 rows whose full measurement identity and row/context payload hashes verify; placeholders and source-attested retry rows remain missing work.

nodes.name: Runtime receipt
nodes.summary: Binds shared-deadline arm allocations, right-censoring, measured cleanup, and explicitly unmeasured outer scopes to the exact experiment runtime regime.

nodes.name: Promotion supervisor
nodes.summary: Preflights authority inputs, binds optional producer objectives, passes the evaluator its live remaining wall, validates runtime receipts, rejects duplicate baseline-bound treatments, reaps role process groups, and owns the monotone search ref.

nodes.name: Evaluator entrypoint
nodes.summary: Selects the locked runtime and invokes the trusted paired evaluator outside the candidate surface.

nodes.name: Codex KG producer
nodes.summary: Gives GPT-5.4 a bounded one-hop architecture subgraph plus bound objective and closed failure codes, hides supervisor protocol paths, and emits bounded structured failures.

nodes.name: Crucible program
nodes.summary: Centralizes experimentation, constraints, preferences, setup, power and runtime admission, deduplication, infrastructure-safe checkpoint reuse, usage accounting, and the closed dynamic-feedback boundary; only its candidate_program section is model-facing.

nodes.name: Candidate replay producer
nodes.summary: Reuses the exact candidate revision after scoreless infrastructure invalidation, rebases only across evaluator revisions, and preserves bounded structured producer failures.
